title: Under a Rock - Official Taming Gameplay Trailer
description: Check out the Taming Gameplay Trailer for Under a Rock, an open-world survival and creature taming game developed by Nordic Trolls. Bring them back to base to produce resources and eventually hatch them into companions that can be ridden, fight, and evolve over time. Under a Rock is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

title: PlayStation Plus Games for June 2026 Add Warhammer 40K, More - IGN Daily Fix
description:
In today's Daily Fix:

Sony has revealed the free games coming to PlayStation Plus in June. Warhammer 40,000: Darktide leads the pak, along with Grounded: Fully Yoked Edition, and Nickelodeon All-Star Brawl 2. Destiny 2 is also coming to Extra and Premium tiers, coinciding with the game's final content update. In other news, The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine is getting an anniversary livestream this week, and it could be the perfect time to announce new Witcher 3 DLC. And finally, we should all be playing Grand Theft Auto 6 right now, if it weren't for the pesky delays.

title: Marathon - Official Season 2 Cinematic Trailer
description:
Watch the Season 2 Cinematic Trailer for Marathon, the hit extraction first-person shooter developed by Bungie. Players will head into the night as Nightfall emerges on Dire Marsh, offering a tense and dark experience against other Runners and new creatures native to Tau Ceti 4. Fight on the new Night Marsh map with new content such as the new Runner shell Sentinel, the Cradle, new weapons, progression improvements, and more. Season 2 for Marathon kicks off on June 2 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

title: Toy Story 5 - Official Final Trailer (2026) Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack
description:
Don't miss the Final Trailer for Toy Story 5, the fifth installment in the classic animated film series distributed by Walt Disney. Embark on another animated adventure with Buzz, Woody, Jessie, and more alongside newcomers with Lilypad in Toy Story 5, in theaters on June 19.

Become acquainted with the new character Lilypad, a high-tech frog-shaped smart tablet voiced by Greta Lee that makes Buzz, Woody, Jessie, and the rest of the gang’s jobs exponentially harder when they have to go head-to-head with the all-new threat to playtime.

Tom Hanks returns as the ever loyal cowboy Woody, Tim Allen reports for duty as Buzz Lightyear, and Joan Cusack saddles up again as the rootin’ tootin’ cowgirl Jessie. It was recently announced that Conan O’Brien will also be a part of the voice cast as the toilet training tech toy, Smarty Pants.

“Toy Story 5” is directed by Academy Award® winner Andrew Stanton, co-directed by Kenna Harris, and produced by Lindsey Collins. The animated adventure releases in theaters nationwide on June 19.

title: 9 Things You Need to Know About World of Tanks: HEAT
description:
The creators of the legendary vehicle combat game World of Tanks are back with an entirely new tactical battlefield: World of Tanks: HEAT! Ready to experience an alternate-history timeline where brutal post-WWII military engineering blends with raw, mechanical sci-fi fantasy? Then this is the game for you.

We're breaking down 9 things you need to know before you jump into the driver's seat and dominate the frontlines! World of Tanks: HEAT is free-to-play and available right now on Wargaming Game Center, Steam (including Steam Deck), Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, and NVIDIA GeForce NOW.

Presented by World of Tanks: HEAT.

title: What to Expect From the PlayStation State of Play - June 2026
description:
Sony is back with another PlayStation State of Play on June 2, 2026 at 2pm PT/5pm ET/10pm BST, so get ready for a whole host of new PS5 game announcements, fresh looks at gameplay, and maybe even some other surprises. With only Marvel’s Wolverine currently listed as being part of the hour-plus long presentation set to share “updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world”, there’s a lot to theorise about.

For context, last year’s equivalent stream saw the reveals of Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, Nioh 3, and Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles, as well as fresh gameplay looks at 007 First Light, Silent Hill f, Ghost of Yotei, and Pragmata. But what can we expect to see this year? Well, let’s get stuck in and look at exactly that.
